description: Federated driver-data sources. Resonate links to driver libraries wherever their owners maintain them, instead of copying the files. The in-app driver browser reads this list (and you can paste any GitHub repo ad hoc). Add a source by opening a PR that appends an entry here.

sources.name: Matt (mtg90) / AVS Forum
sources.description: ~430 drivers from the mtg90 AVS Forum collection. See drivers/matt/meta.json for provenance.

sources.name: Choong Keat Yian
sources.description: 1 driver contributed by Choong Keat Yian.

sources.name: speakerboxlite.com
sources.description: ~6000 drivers from the speakerboxlite.com community database. Loaded live via their open API.
